projectDescription: A VS Code extension that integrates py-spy and memray profilers to visualize Python CPU and memory performance as interactive flamegraphs with inline code annotations.
keyFeatures: CPU profiling with py-spy for Python scripts and Jupyter notebooks
Memory profiling with memray (Linux, macOS, WSL, Docker)
Interactive flamegraph visualization with zoom, filtering, and module legend
Inline code annotations showing timing or memory per function scope
Attach profiler to a running process by PID
Profile pytest unit tests with a single command
VS Code Tasks integration for custom profiling workflows
Linked flamegraph and inline annotations — selecting a node filters the annotations
publicApiSurface: flamegraph.profileCell — Profile Jupyter cell with py-spy
flamegraph.profileNotebook — Profile Jupyter notebook with py-spy
flamegraph.memoryProfileCell — Profile Jupyter cell with memray
flamegraph.memoryProfileNotebook — Profile Jupyter notebook with memray
flamegraph.attachProfiler — Attach py-spy to running process
flamegraph.attachMemoryProfiler — Attach memray to running process
flamegraph.memoryLive — Attach memray live view to running process
flamegraph.runPytestFile — Profile pytest tests in active file
flamegraph task definition (tasks.json) with file, pid, args, native, subprocesses, sudo, pythonPath, profilerPath
